top_findings.summary: The skill is described as auditing "wallet security including private key management and transaction signing" but extensively requests market data APIs, exchange API keys, and performs trading analysis (e.g., technical indicators, trading signals, portfolio risk metrics). These capabilities are unrelated to the stated security audit purpose and could enable unauthorized trading or excessive data collection beyond security review needs.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill is described as auditing "wallet security including private key management and transaction signing" but extensively requests market data APIs, exchange API keys, and performs trading analysis (e.g., technical indicators, trading signals, portfolio risk metrics). These capabilities are unrelated to the stated security audit purpose and could enable unauthorized trading or excessive data collection beyond security review needs.
